body.text: SCOTUS double-header TODAY: opinions expected this morning — first live Wolford v. Lopez window — plus conference at 10am ET

SCOTUSblog's updated calendar moves the opinion window up from Monday: opinions are expected this morning, with the conference at 10am, orders Monday June 8, and another conference June 11. Virginia's Lynchburg court heard the background-check standoff Wednesday — no ruling publicly reported yet.

facts.title: 2. SCOTUS opinion day TODAY — Wolford window

body.text:
• SCOTUS: opinions expected this morning + conference 10am; orders Mon Jun 8
• Virginia: Lynchburg arguments held Wed — no outcome reported (Unverified)
• New Jersey: SAF expands 'guilty by association' confiscation suit
• Tennessee: Gov. Lee signs SB1847 deadly-force property-defense law
